prestazioni: Engine: LSY 2.0L Turbo I4 (engine code LSY) – Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 30+ psi of boost. Precision Turbo & Engine PT6766 CEA turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch V-band downpipe and Vibrant Performance 304 stainless steel intercooler piping.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1700x fuel injectors paired with a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup and a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump. AEM Infinity 708 ECU with a custom flex-fuel ethanol sensor for E85 compatibility, tuned by HP Tuners with a 300+ hp target at the wheels.

Suspension & Handling: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 8-position adjustable rebound and 16-level compression damping, paired with Whiteline adjustable rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and polyurethane bushings. Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers with 355mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads for aggressive stopping power.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny widebody conversion kit (Envision-specific) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders to fit 20x10.5 ET25 wheels. Custom 3D-printed carbon fiber side skirts with integrated LED turn signals and a Maxton Design GT-style rear wing with adjustable angle for downforce tuning.

Exterior: Full vinyl wrap in 3M Gloss Black Cherry with a satin black roof and mirror caps. Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED headlights with custom C-shaped DRLs and sequential turn signals. Rear bumper delete with a custom titanium exhaust tip setup (dual 3.5-inch outlets) from MagnaFlow.

Interior: Recaro SPG XL front seats with custom Alcantara and red stitching, paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a MOMO Mod.78 wheel. Full custom roll cage (8-point) with bolt-in harness bar and Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Digital dash overlay with an AIM MXS Strada 7-inch display for real-time telemetry.
